name: Romance of Vietnam & Cambodia from Mekong Delta to Angkor Wat 13 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnels - Mekong Delta - Chau Doc - Phnom Penh - Battambang  - Siem Reap
highlights: Explore the most well-known romantic destinations in Vietnam & Cambodia
Immerse in the rustic charm of the Mekong Delta and the sacred Cao Dai Temple
Enjoy the bamboo train ride with your honey in Battambang and discover its dreamy beauty
Admire the incredible temples of the Angkor Complex and Banteay Srei

itinerary.title: Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Arrive at Tan Son Nhat International Airport. Our guide and driver will pick you up and transfer you to your hotel in Saigon. Check-in and have a rest after a long flight. Evening

Be free & easy to explore the biggest city of Vietnam or go to Ben Thanh Market to buy some local foods. Overnight in your hotel.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Full Day Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have a tasty breakfast at your hotel. 08:00: Our guide will be happy to meet you and give an outline of the City tour today:

Visit the Reunification Palace, which used to be the workplace of the President of the Republic of Vietnam. Stop at the War Remnants Museum, which exhibits documents, images, and artifacts about the evidence and consequences of the Vietnam War. Admire the Roman and Gothic architecture of Notre Dame Cathedral and Old Post Office, 2 of the most famous and oldest classical French architecture. Have lunch in a local restaurant and take a short rest
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Cao Dai Temple - Cu Chi Tunnels
itinerary.description:
Morning

Breakfast will be served at your hotel's restaurant. Transfer to Tay Ninh to visit Cao Dai Temple (known as Tay Ninh Holy See), famous for its outstanding structure. Let’s walk around the temple and look at the unique construction that looks like the representation of a church but with a bright color. This temple's outside and inside areas are all designed and decorated by incorporating symbols and images of saints. Afternoon

After lunch, join a half-day trip to Cu Chi Tunnels, a Vietnam war relic
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta Exploration - Tan Phong Island - Can Tho
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast, then travel to Cai Be tourist wharf for a journey to explore the pretty Mekong Delta:

Sailing along the Cai Be River and witnessing the green riverbank and how local people live in the river region. Visit and enjoy delicious specialties in local traditional craft villages: rice paper, candy, Com, dried longan, and more. Strolling on the village road to the next stop, where you can try the tasty honey tea. The people here take advantage of having many fruit gardens and developed beekeeping. You will be introduced to how to raise bees for honey

itinerary.title: Can Tho - Chau Doc - Sam Mountain
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy your remaining time in Can Tho. In the early morning, you can travel to the famous Cai Rang Floating Market, where you can see the local people's life on boats, try Mekong Delta’s specialties, and witness the gorgeous sunrise. Check out, meet your driver at the hotel lobby, then transfer to Chau Doc, the home of various ethnicities such as Khmer, Cham, Chinese, etc. Afternoon

Our driver will transfer you to Sam Mountain, a famous tourist attraction for its natural beauty and numerous temples. You and your lover can discover approximately 200 relics scattered from the foot to th...

itinerary.title: Chau Doc - Crossing Cambodia Border via Speedboat - Phnom Penh
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your hotel and be free until you transfer to the pier. Take a speedboat and go to Cambodia. Please remember to keep your Visa. After crossing the border, you will travel to Phnom Penh. Go to your hotel and check in

itinerary.title: Phnom Penh Full day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning & Afternoon

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel. Get ready for a trip to the must-visit spots in Pnom Penh:

Admire the Royal Palace, the heart of Cambodia, built in 1866. The gilded roof and impressive Khmer architecture are the outstanding features of this landscape. Take your time to explore the stunning area with many areas with buildings of different shapes and sizes, including the famous Silver Pagoda, whose floor is lined with solid silver tiles. Continue to the Cambodia National Museum

itinerary.title: Phnom Penh - Road Transfer To Battambang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Indulge in a scrumptious breakfast at your hotel before your scheduled pick-up and transfer to Battambang. The journey will take approximately 5 hours. Reaching Battambang, check in at your hotel and take some time to unwind and relax. The rest of the day is free for you to spend as you wish.

itinerary.title: Battambang Bamboo Train - Bat Caves
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your hotel. Transfer to Bamboo Train Battambang, and you will have a chance to try the unique bamboo train here, called Nori by locals. Enjoy the natural scenery along the way and witness the people's daily life here. Arrive at a fishing village and interact with the friendly inhabitants. You will also visit the fruit farms and look at the specialties of Battambang

itinerary.title: Battambang - Say Hello to Siem Reap
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, our driver will transfer you to Siem Reap. On the way, you can see the greenery landscapes and scenic villages. Embark on a scenic 3-hour road trip to Siem Reap, taking in the beautiful scenery along the way. Once you arrive, check-in at your hotel and take some time to unwind and relax. This is the perfect opportunity to recharge your batteries and prepare yourself for the exciting adventures that await you in Siem Reap

itinerary.title: Siem Reap - Explore Angkor Fullday Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel. Our driver will pick you up around 7:45 - 8:00 for a day trip to the majestic Angkor Archeological Park. The first stop is the Angkor Thom complex. Within these magnificent walls, you'll discover the fascinating beauty of Bayon and the world-famous Ta Prohm (Tomb Raider) Temple. Satiate your hunger at one of the many local restaurants within the Angkor Complex with some delicious Cambodian cuisine!

Afternoon

Admire Angkor Wat is a UNESCO site that makes Cambodia much more famous and has become a symbol of Cambodia

itinerary.title: Siem Reap - Ta Prohm - Tonle Sap - Artisan D’Angkor
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 8:00, begin your day with a visit to the iconic Ta Prohm Temple, a mystical Buddhist site dedicated to the mother of Jayavarman VII. Marvel at the massive tree roots intertwined with ancient stone ruins, creating a scene straight out of a storybook. After exploring Ta Prohm, take time to visit nearby temples for a more complete Angkor experience. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant, savoring authentic Cambodian flavors before your afternoon adventure. Afternoon

At 13:30, embark on a scenic boat tour of Tonle Sap Lake to discover the unique lifestyle of floating villages

itinerary.title: Siem Reap Departure
itinerary.description: Have breakfast at your hotel. You can go around and shop in Central Market for some souvenirs. Check out, then transfer to Siem Reap International Airport for a flight back to your hometown. End of services!

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam and Cambodia, as per itinerary.
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
All prices in USD, are based on per adult, in Double/Twin sharing
Surcharge will be applied for single traveler or single room request
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
